title: Adaptive Learning Engine for Test App
goal: Automatically adjust difficulty, topic mix, and review timing based on performance.

master_rules.promotion_rule: If accuracy >= 80% across the last 20 items in a skill bucket, increase difficulty by one level.
master_rules.stabilize_rule: If accuracy is between 60% and 79%, keep difficulty the same and add mixed review.
master_rules.support_rule: If accuracy < 60% across the last 12 items in a skill bucket, lower difficulty or assign scaffolded strategy items.
master_rules.review_rule: Missed concepts reappear within 1-2 sessions with shorter simpler items first.

session_builder_logic: Then serve 5-8 targeted items from weak skills.
Then mix in 3 medium transfer items from nearby skills.
End with 1 challenge item if recent accuracy is strong.
anti_frustration_rules: Never give more than 3 hard misses in a row without a simpler rebound item.
Insert a strategy-tip card after 2 misses in the same skill.
Offer untimed retry mode after repeated low-confidence errors.
